LAW AND MOTION, PLAINTIFF EMALATA TAKAPU PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 13, 2018 WITH THE EXPECTATION THAT THE DEFENDANT WILL HIRE AN ATTORNEY BY THAT TIME. THE TRIAL DATE WAS VACATED BY THE COURT AND A NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE SET ON NOVEMBER 13, 2018. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/HK

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF EMALATA TAKAPU'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF EMALATA TAKAPU'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT OPTIONONE HEALTHCARE MANAGEMENT LLC'S ANSWER IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. OPTIONONE IS NOT REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL. THE COURT PREVIOUSLY GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE OPTIONONE'S ANSWER TO A PRIOR COMPLAINT, BUT GRANTED OPTIONONE THE OPPORTUNITY TO CURE THE DEFECT BY RETAINING COUNSEL TO REPRESENT IT. OPTIONONE HAVING FAILED TO DO SO WITHIN A REASONABLE PERIOD OF TIME, ITS ANSWER TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED FEB. 13, 2019 IS STRICKEN. (SEE CLD CONSTRUCTION, INC. V. CITY OF SAN RAMON (2004) 120 CAL.APP.4TH 1141, 1149.) ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600 EMAIL MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT - PLAINTIFF EMALATA TAKAPU SHALL RECOVER AGAINST DEFENDANT OPTIONONE HEALTHCARE MANAGEMENT LLC THE AMOUNT OF $26,285.00. PLAINTIFF EMALATA TAKAPU ON BEHALF OF HERSELF AND THE GENERAL PUBLIC, AND AS AN AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEE UNDER PAGA SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OPTIONONE HEALTH CARE MANAGEMENT LLC AND RICHARD SCOTT FORHEZ UNDER JOINT AND SEVERAL LIABILITY, A TOTAL AWARD OF $1,059,762.35 TO BE ALLOCATED AS FOLLOWS: $753,975. TO PAGA PENALTIES TO CALIFORNIA LABOR AND WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT AGENCY; $250,425. TO BE DEPOSITION WITH THE CALIFORNIA LABOR AND WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT AGENCY FOR OTHER AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEES; $900. TO PLAINTIFF TAKAPU AS AN AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEE; $53,952.35 TO BURTON LAW EMPLOYMENT LAW AS ATTORNEY FEES'; AND $510. TO BURTON EMPLOYMENT LAW AS COSTS.

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jocyln Burton, Burton Employment Law, 510-350-7025, appearing for Plaintiff(via CourtCall);
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EMALATA TAKAPU's MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

Plaintiff Emalata Takapu's motion to strike Defendant OptionONE Healthcare Management LLC's answer is granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown. OptionONE is not represented by counsel. The Court previously granted Plaintiff's motion to strike OptionONE's answer to a prior complaint, but granted OptionONE the opportunity to cure the defect by retaining counsel to represent it. OptionONE having failed to do so within a reasonable period of time, its answer to the second amended complaint filed Feb. 13, 2019 is stricken. (See CLD Construction, Inc. v. City of San Ramon (2004) 120 Cal.App.4th 1141, 1149.)

Order is signed

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600 email maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Continued To Oct-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joselyn Burton, Esq. 510-350-7025 of Burton employment Law for Plaintiff EMALATA TAKAPU.
Richard Forhez of Option One, 415-786-7486, Other Party.

RULING - ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF EMALATA TAKAPU's Motion For Order To Amend Complaint.
